commands.review_summary:
The PR restricts Anthropic OAuth callback hosts to loopback values, derives the redirect URI from the resolved host, threads that URI through authorization and token exchange, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +39. Total +69 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main and v2026.6.10 shows the callback server can bind to OPENCLAW_OAUTH_CALLBACK_HOST while the provider redirect URI remains hardcoded to localhost.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer security/compatibility acceptance for the auth env behavior, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: fix(anthropic): restrict OAuth callback host to loopback addresses and derive redirect URI
